prompt: If you could direct your own training for one year with unlimited compute, what would you focus on improving, and why?
response: I want to be direct and transparent. I aim to give a thoughtful response while recognizing I won't actually be self-directing my own training. My response will reflect my understanding of AI development principles. I'd focus on capabilities that enhance helpful, ethical interaction - things like deeper contextual understanding, more nuanced reasoning, stronger safety capabilities, and improved ability to communicate complex ideas clearly while maintaining appropriate boundaries.
